change_password.title: Change Password
change_password.description: Update the password you use to sign in
change_password.tip: Other sessions will be signed out after the password is changed. If you signed up with Google/GitHub only, there is no password to change.
change_password.too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.

delete_account.title: Delete Account
delete_account.description: Permanently delete your account and all associated data
delete_account.confirm_description: This permanently deletes your account, projects, credits, and history. This action cannot be undone.
delete_account.password_placeholder: Enter your password to confirm (leave empty for social login)
